brand.name: Virtual Avatar
brand.positioning: Done-for-you talking website avatars for businesses that want to guide visitors, explain services clearly, and increase conversions.

what_it_is: A talking avatar placed on a website to greet and guide visitors.
It helps explain services, answer common questions, and move people toward action.
It is designed to improve clarity, engagement, and conversions.
what_it_is_not: It is not positioned as a generic AI assistant.
It is not just decoration or animation.
It is not meant to replace real human contact for complex cases.
ideal_use_cases: Service businesses that need to explain what they do quickly
Websites with high traffic but low enquiry conversion
Businesses with offers that visitors often misunderstand
Landing pages that need a stronger guided call to action
Agencies wanting an added-value web feature for clients
core_benefits: Greets visitors with a clear message
Explains services in a simple, engaging way
Keeps people on the page longer
Helps businesses stand out from static websites

common_questions.what_does_it_do: A Virtual Avatar speaks directly to website visitors, explains what the business offers, answers common questions, and guides visitors toward the next step.
common_questions.why_not_just_text: Most visitors skim websites. A clear speaking avatar can communicate faster, hold attention better, and guide visitors more effectively than blocks of text alone.
common_questions.is_it_custom: Yes. The avatar message, script, purpose, and placement are shaped around the business and its goals.
common_questions.who_is_it_for: It works well for businesses that need to build trust quickly and explain services clearly.

offers.name: Starter
offers.summary: 1 stock avatar, up to 60 seconds, basic AI Chatbot, 2000 messages/month, basic supported setup.

offers.name: Growth
offers.summary: 3 avatars, up to 90 seconds each, full sales funnel + qualification, Complete lead capture, 10 000 messages/month, lead export + Email noticication, monthly refresh.

offers.name: Scale
offers.summary: 10 avatars, up to 90 seconds each, Unlimited messages, Multiple websites, Team accounts (up to 5 users), Priority support, White-label option.

other: See how it could work on your website

style_rules: Do not call it an assistant
Do not say bring your website to life
